--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local local function H(H)return r[H+(535977+-499720)]end do local H=table.insert local q=string.sub local R=type local M=math.floor local Z=string.char local z=string.len local x=r local
